blocks.text: 🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka; Russell (51pts) leads Antonelli (47pts) in title race
Four points split Russell and Antonelli in the 2026 championship. Suzuka's ruthless layout has a habit of forcing title hands — set the alarm for Friday morning.

blocks.label: 🚴 Norwegian Spring Classics
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on the cobbles
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold leads Norwegian charge
